description: Brittney model weights are runtime artifacts, not canonical HoloLand source. Prefer explicit paths or artifact roots before repo-local fallback paths.
stableArtifactLane: Jetson /mnt/nvme/holo/models/hololand, or an equivalent mounted path passed through an artifact-root env var.

models.notes: Legacy local fallback retained only so existing developer checkouts do not break before weights move to the artifact lane.
Proprietary fallback is age-prune debt; keep only manifests/download references in canonical source.
